response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 13+ years of experience, recent Staff title, and emerging exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Acme Software. However, the resume shows minimal demonstrated production GenAI experience — no explicit work with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK in a pricing context rather than designing AI systems on cloud platforms. Customer-facing technical leadership is not evidenced. Could be a fit if the recent Acme role has deeper GenAI substance than the resume conveys.
strengths: 13+ years polyglot engineering across web, backend, and infrastructure with Staff-level titles
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at Acme Software
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, testing, mentoring, and public workshops/talks
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
No demonstrated multi-agent framework experience (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting work

key_factors.factor: Missing core GenAI stack (RAG, vector DBs, evals)
Recent MCP and agentic-workflow exposure at Acme
